response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong full-stack software engineering expertise and 13+ years of professional experience, they critically lack the three mandatory technical requirements: substantive C++ development (only ~1 year versus required 5-10 years), Windows platform experience (entire background is Linux/web/cloud), and capital markets/fixed income domain knowledge. This is a fundamental mismatch for a role requiring deep C++ systems work in capital markets environments.
strengths: 13+ years of professional software engineering across diverse domains at appropriate seniority level
Proven expertise in high-performance systems, distributed infrastructure, CI/CD practices, and TDD methodologies
Strong communication abilities evidenced by workshop creation and technical mentorship
concerns: Minimal C++ experience (~1 year at National Instruments; mandatory requirement is 5-10 years)
No Windows platform development background; entire career focused on Linux, web, cloud, and Node.js ecosystems
No capital markets, fixed income, derivatives, or investment banking domain exposure; fintech experience limited to generic startup operations
